accepted.reason: Utility metric kernels (weighted stats/inequality metrics) are useful numeric preprocessing workloads.
Astrophysical magnitude-distance transforms are compact scientific-computing kernels.
Lane-detection column histogram logic is a common dense image-loop workload.
Graph adjacency-to-edge transformations are reusable structural data kernels.
Board-validity and move-generation loops are concise algorithmic kernels.
MPC gradient/matvec iterations are high-value control-optimization kernels.
Triangle area aggregation is a practical geometry/meshing kernel with simple tight loops.

skipped.reason: Learning/example array wrapper code is low-depth tutorial material, not strong standalone optimization data.
Binding/default wrapper logic is integration-heavy and less reusable for generic conversion tasks.
Specialized domain routine appears tightly coupled and not broadly transferable for GRPO supervision.
